summary: Iteration 6 — Landing polish + Manager doc verify/reject end-to-end. BACKEND: all 24 phase4 pytest tests still pass (test_phase4.py, 11.7s, 100%). FRONTEND: (1) Landing page (/) loads with [data-testid=page-landing], hero-cta-primary, all 8 service-card-0..7 with new useTilt-driven 3D cards, see-all-services, cta-bottom-primary — mouse-move tilt does NOT throw any JS error (0 console errors during mouse manipulation). (2) Smoke tests for /services, /about, /portfolio, /contact and back to / all load cleanly with no errors. RouteLoader visible on first load. (3) Manager Hub (/app/manager) loads as admin with 5 KPI cards (Interns=5, Active today=3, At-risk=4, Badges=4, Tasks overdue=0), 5 intern rows incl. Projexino Intern (f221d3a9...), live feed sorted desc. (4) Verify/Reject flow: expanded target intern row, clicked reject-{id}-bank_details, window.prompt appeared (handled via page.on('dialog')), backend POST /api/manager/verify-document recorded verified=False + verifier_note + verified_by='Projexino Admin' + verified_at. Then clicked verify-{id}-bank_details — succeeded. Then re-rejected for intern badge test — succeeded. (5) Intern view (/intern/documents) for intern@projexino.com: Bank Account Details card now shows red 'Rejected' badge via [data-testid=doc-status-bank_details], and [data-testid=doc-rejection-bank_details] shows 'Rejected by Projexino Admin. Please re-upload. "Photo quality is too low, please re-upload a clearer image."' Other 4 docs show amber 'Pending review' tri-state badge. Re-upload CTA shown only for the rejected slot.

issues: [carry-over from iter 5] Nested <a> hydration warning — Logo component already renders an anchor and is wrapped inside another <Link to='/'>. Not user-visible but emits 4 React warnings. Recommend Logo accept asLink={false} prop or unwrap outer Link.

action_items: (Low priority, carried over) Fix nested <a> hydration warning — Logo inside <Link to='/'> in Login.jsx and Landing.jsx service cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Manager.jsx verify() now correctly differentiates verify vs reject — only prompts on reject path and passes the note to /api/manager/verify-document (line 25-36). Behaviour confirmed live.

InternDocuments.jsx tri-state badge logic is solid: verified===true → emerald 'Verified', verified===false && verified_at → red 'Rejected', else amber 'Pending review'. doc-rejection-{dt} only renders for the rejected state.
useTilt hook works smoothly without throwing on mouse-move; no requestAnimationFrame leaks observed (zero console errors during landing interaction).
Backend /api/manager/verify-document persists verifier_note, verified_by (user name), verified_at — verified live via direct API GET after UI action.
(carry-over) Logo nested-anchor hydration warning remains; non-functional but pollutes console with 4 React warnings on intern documents page.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — landing/8 service tilt cards/route smoke, manager verify+reject+re-verify+re-reject all succeed, intern Rejected badge + reason render correctly

test_credentials: admin@projexino.com / Projexino@2026, manager@projexino.com / Manager@2026, hr@projexino.com / HR@2026, intern@projexino.com / Intern@2026 — all verified live.
seed_data_creation: Re-submitted bank_details for intern@projexino.com (file_name=bank_test.pdf). Currently in rejected state with verifier_note 'Photo quality is too low...'. Other 4 docs (pan_card, id_proof, address_proof, resume) are in submitted/pending state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Target intern_id for intern@projexino.com is f221d3a9-2654-43e7-b76b-cabba122a845. Manager rows don't include email in visible text — search by name/designation or call GET /api/manager/interns first to map id. For window.prompt during reject use page.on('dialog', lambda d: asyncio.create_task(d.accept('reason'))). Login form: if input[type=email] not visible, click 'Continue' role card first to flip the form.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs. Only carry-over cosmetic warning (nested <a> from Logo inside Link). Recommendation: add asLink prop to Logo in /app/frontend/src/components/Logo.jsx and pass asLink={false} when used inside an outer <Link>.
